## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavioural change)
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (and I added/updated tests for the changed module)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally with stub env vars (or I verified the Vercel preview)
- [ ] No secrets, service-account JSON, or `.env*` files are included in this PR
- [ ] If this PR adds a new env var, I updated `.env.example` AND added it to Vercel project settings
